caption: A bald man wearing a blue t-shirt with the logo "excel" and a white lanyard stands in front of a dark blue background featuring white and light blue text and graphics. The background includes phrases such as "has geek," "rootconf," and various hashtag symbols. The man stands with his arms crossed, looking toward the camera. In the background, other people are seated in rows of dark chairs; they are partially visible and mostly blurred, with some wearing striped shirts. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a similar pose, though he slightly shifts his position and gaze. The camera angle remains relatively stable, focusing on the man as the central figure against the branded backdrop and the seated audience behind him.
